title: Tunisian Roasted Mars Bar Toast
description: A sweet and crispy dessert inspired by Indian flavors, perfect for a snack or dessert. This recipe combines the flavors of roasted Mars bar with the crunch of toasted bread.

ingredients.name: Tunisian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: 2. Place the crisp toast pieces on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. In a small pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
4. Add the roasted Mars bar pieces to the pan and stir to coat with the coconut oil.
5. Sprinkle the Tunisian spice blend over the Mars bar pieces and stir to combine.
6. Add the toasted bread pieces to the pan and stir to combine with the Mars bar mixture.
7. If using honey, drizzle over the top and stir to combine.
8. Serve warm, garnished with additional Tunisian spice blend if desired.
